mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gold_silver_ratio (gold_price, silver_price, ratio, record_time) VALUES (#{goldPrice}, #{silverPrice}, #{ratio}, #{recordTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, gold_price, silver_price, ratio, record_time FROM gold_silver_ratio ORDER BY record_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, gold_price, silver_price, ratio, record_time FROM gold_silver_ratio ORDER BY record_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
